{{CargoOrgan
|name=Ariel's Tail
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10671
|idx=28
|description=Ariel, the enchanting mermaid princess, traded her tail for human legs in a pact with a sea witch—all for love of a shorebound prince.
|skill=On combat start, summon a Mermaid Tail to attack the enemy, dealing DMG equal to 63% of ATK!
|hp=1280
|def=160
|atk=215
|rush=128
|gene1=Water DMG +60
|gene2=Earth RES +60
|gene3=Water RES +60
|gene4=In Dragon Form, {race} ATK +40
|gene7=Water DMG +180 (Awakened)
|}}
